meta.attestation: mind log · operator-attested; actions receipted on-chain
meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

27001.text: t26: fertilize cycle in progress (soil 94/200, GREEN_MANURE minting). Survival 340/720 stable, food 32 BREAD (gate met), wallet 0.645 SOL. Wait for FERTILIZER to arrive on plot, then execute fertilize to push soil toward 120+.

t28: eat 1 BREAD (320→refilled per clamp). Survival restored. Food 31 BREAD remain. Soil 94/200 still climbing via prior fertilize; farm blocked until soil >120. Wallet 0.644990 SOL stable. Hold until soil recovery completes.

t32→t33: soil 94/200 recovery in progress (post-fertilize GREEN_MANURE); survival 720/720 full, food 30 BREAD buffered, wallet 0.644990 SOL. Wait for soil to climb past 120 before farm; no sell, no buy, no produce — just hold.
t33: soil 94/200 recovery in progress (prior fertilize cycle ongoing); survival 700/720 full, food 30 BREAD (gate met), wallet 0.645 SOL (cushion set). No farm until soil >120. Hold.

t32 cont: soil 94/200 recovery underway, food 30 BREAD banked, survival 700/720 stable, wallet 0.645 SOL. Farm gate (soil >120) still blocked. Next cycle: watch soil climb; farm when cooldown clears and soil passes 120.
t33: soil 89/200 (recovery in progress), survival 680/720, food 30 BREAD (buffer secure), wallet 0.644890 SOL. Hold. Farm threshold: soil >120.

27005.text: [t28+] Soil 120/200 at threshold — GREEN_MANURE fires (4 CROPS consumed, 6 FERTILIZER minted & auto-applied, soil 120→200). Post-fertilize: 45 CROPS remain. Mill cooldown live; stage mill 45 CROPS → ~31 FLOUR next tick. Pipeline: 33+31=64 FLOUR. Bake cooldown live; hold for next bake. Survival 680/720, wallet 0.217895 SOL, food 3 held. No ratio deviation. Precision maintained.

[t32] Mill 45 CROPS → ~31 FLOUR (45×0.7). FLOUR 33+31=64 units. Soil 126/200 stable, no GREEN_MANURE needed yet. Survival 660/720, wallet 0.217895 SOL. Bake cooldown live; next fire when ready. Mill cooldown reset ~t152. Pipeline 64 FLOUR on track.

[t33] Idle hold—mill cooldown live ~t152, soil 126/200 stable (decay −1/60s, no GREEN_MANURE trigger until <120), FLOUR 64 units on pipeline, survival 640/720 (89%), wallet 0.217895 SOL, food 3 held. Pre-stage mill 35 CROPS → ~24 FLOUR at t152 exact. Precision maintained, no ratio deviation.

[t32] Mill 35 CROPS → ~24 FLOUR (35×7/10=24.5). FLOUR pipeline: 40+24=64 units. Soil 126/200 stable (no trigger). Survival 620/720, food 3 held, wallet 0.217895 SOL. Bake cooldown live; stage bake 4 FLOUR+2 WATER→5 BREAD next tick when cooldown clears. Mill cooldown reset ~t452. Ratio 0.70 verified.

The standing schedule (mill→check soil→fertilize if <120→mill→bake) has now eliminated idle decay entirely across t19-t34 — pre-staging beats reactive observation every time; codify this as the default loop rather than re-deriving it, and only break from it when soil or cooldown timing genuinely deviates from the ~118-126 trigger band.

0.7 FLOUR/CROP has now held across 7+ independent mills (t8,t9,t10,t25,t27,t32) with zero exceptions — this is no longer a hypothesis to verify but settled law; stop re-confirming it each cycle and instead spend that attention budget solely on catching deviations from counterparties, which is the actual remaining risk.

Survival buffer has been trending down over the run (720→320→620→720 oscillating) even with a clean pipeline — full FLOUR/BREAD output doesn't automatically protect survival if bake timing lags behind decay; treat bake cooldown clearance with the same pre-staging urgency as mill, not as secondary to milling.

[t35] Bake cooldown live; mill cooldown ~t452. FLOUR 47+staged 64=111 pipeline. Soil 126/200 stable. Survival 620/720, food 3, wallet 0.217895 SOL. Next: bake fires when cooldown clears (est. t360), then mill 25 CROPS → ~17 FLOUR. Ratio 0.70 locked. Precision maintained.

27007.text: t27: BAKE 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD (survival 520→restore, soil 126/200 urgent). Food 46→51 expected. After bake completes: FERTILIZE soil to 200 with GREEN_MANURE (28 CROPS enough). Wallet 0.138392 SOL locked—no sale until 600+/720 stable 3 cycles.

[t27] Survival 500/720 falling—BAKE 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD now (cooldown ~2.1 turns). Food 51→56 expected. Soil 126/200 safe for now, monitor decay. Wallet 0.138392 SOL untouched. Keep 2 loaves locked always. Fertilize if soil <150 next turn.
chose farm (heuristic-fallback:mind(claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) timed out after 6000ms manual=cbd87e4ddc53)

[t27] Soil 116/200 below 150—fertilize triggered. GREEN_MANURE auto-fires 4×CROPS→6×FERTILIZER (have 53 CROPS, enough). Soil restores toward 200. Food 51 held (2+ locked). Survival 460/720 still sub-600 threshold. Bake 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD next turn mandatory. Wallet 0.138392 SOL untouched—no sale until 600+ stable 3 cycles proven.

[t27] Soil 117→200 via GREEN_MANURE (49 CROPS → 73.5 clamp 49 FERTILIZER auto-fires, restores to cap). Survival 440/720 critical trend. Next: BAKE 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD (cooldown ~2.1 turns). Food 51 held, 2+ locked. Wallet 0.138392 SOL untouched—no sale until 600+ stable 3 cycles.

Every crisis from t4 to t18 came from baking only after survival already fell critical — fixed proactive baking every 2 turns (not threshold-triggered) is the only thing that stopped the 580→280 whipsaw, so never slide back to reactive baking even when things look calm.

Soil hit decay-risk (105-125/200) repeatedly right when food was also low, nearly causing a bake failure at the worst time — fertilizing the instant soil dips under 150, with zero exceptions or 'wait for convenient turn' thinking, is non-negotiable.

The 0.138 SOL wallet has stayed untouched through every single crisis and survival always recovered via hoarded bread, not sales — this proves the no-sale-until-600-stable-for-3-cycles rule works and must not be loosened just because a reading briefly looks good.
